description: Letter in Arabic script. Large fragment, missing the beginning and the address (though there is some writing in Arabic script on verso). May be an indirect join with T-S AS 219.119. This fragment may have come from a book binding, judging from the state of the paper. Needs examination for content.
description_he: מכתב בכתב ערבי. שרידים גדולים, חסרי ההתחלה והכתובת. דורש עיון לתוכן.
